metadata.seed: Well, he called to ask, I mean, just to check in. And, you know, it's the. Is getting ready to decide what my major is. And, of course, so he still wants me to do biocam so I can be pre med. And just looking at this project this week, there's so much work. I'm not. Just not feeling sure that I want to get through there.

patient.query: Honestly, every time I get a message from him, my heart starts racing. It’s like I’m on edge, wondering what he wants or if I'm going to say the wrong thing. I just feel this weight, like I have to keep everything under control, but it really chips away at my energy. It’s frustrating because I want to be able to respond without feeling this tightness in my chest.

automatic_thoughts: wondering what he wants
if I'm going to say the wrong thing
I have to keep everything under control

patient.query: Yeah, it really is. I wish I could just take a breath and not feel so... tense. Sometimes, I think maybe I should just ignore him or say something to put up a boundary, but then I worry about how he will react. I just want things to be simple, but they never are, you know? It’s like I’m just waiting for something bad to happen.

I should say something to put up a boundary
I'm waiting for something bad to happen

patient.query: I don’t know, it’s just this nagging feeling that if I say the wrong thing, it’ll blow up, and then I’ll have to deal with the fallout. It's like I’m anticipating the worst, and then I can’t shake that feeling. Waiting for a reaction just makes me feel... trapped, I guess. I want to be more confident in what I say, but instead, I feel like I’m just treading water, hoping I don’t sink.

automatic_thoughts: if I say the wrong thing, it’ll blow up
I’m anticipating the worst
I can’t shake that feeling

patient.query: Yeah, it really does feel like a cycle. Sometimes I catch myself overthinking every little detail, like even just how I word something. I wish I could just let go and not worry about the consequences, but it’s like this fear just grips me. I don’t want to upset him or cause drama, but at the same time, I can feel myself getting so drained from it all.
